When user-supplied Markdown content is rendered, embedded raw HTML—including ``` Open it on browser. View the HTTP request in Burp Collaborator. ### Impact Successful exploitation allows an attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim’s browser, leading to: - Session hijacking - Account takeover - Credential theft - Defacement or injection of malicious content - Exfiltration of sensitive data via API tokens, CSRF tokens, or user information This affects all users who can view Markdown content within the application.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00213, "percentile": 0.11523}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-32q2-hhr5-6qvv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T17:57:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-32q2-hhr5-6qvv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-32q2-hhr5-6qvv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46492"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-09T17:17:33Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T17:57:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/commenthol/md-fileserver/security/advisories/GHSA-32q2-hhr5-6qvv", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46492", "https://github.com/commenthol/md-fileserver/releases/tag/v1.10.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-32q2-hhr5-6qvv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/commenthol/md-fileserver/security-advisories/GHSA-32q2-hhr5-6qvv", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/commenthol/md-fileserver", "summary": "md-fileserver: Stored/Reflected XSS when viewing Markdown (raw HTML allowed)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T18:41:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-32q2-hhr5-6qvv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.10.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "md-fileserver"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.10.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
